visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a 2D animation showing two male characters sitting in a fast-food restaurant. One character has black hair and a blue shirt, while the other is bald and wearing a black shirt. They are sitting at a table with a tray containing fries and a drink. The background shows a red interior with a golden arches logo. (2) The camera switches to close-up shots of the characters as they talk. The bald character looks nervous and later shocked, while the black-haired character maintains a relatively calm but engaged expression. The lighting is flat and bright, typical of a cartoon. (3) A brief scene shift occurs showing the bald character against a light blue background with shelves holding various small cartoon characters or plushies. He is scratching the back of his head in thought. (4) The scene returns to the restaurant setting. The black-haired character is seen holding a carton of fries and offering one. The bald character continues to talk with exaggerated facial expressions. (5) Yellow and white text subtitles appear at the bottom of the screen throughout the video, corresponding to the dialogue. A persistent logo is visible at the top center.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: 阿啾小劇場. [Subtitle]: 幹嘛啊不著喔. [Slogan]: 完整影片在Youtube. (2) [Subtitle]: 知道啦. 怎麼了. 哦就是. 我跟學長在一起了. (3) [Subtitle]: 然後最近覺得. 他跟提拉比較好比較有話題. 有點被冷落的感覺. (4) [Subtitle]: 等等我怎麼全部都說出來了. 靠北我還直接大出櫃. 為什麼我會直接講. 可惡, 都怪這張臉. (5) [Subtitle]: 都怪這張長得一臉讓人想出櫃的臉. 讓人想出櫃的臉. 欸, 靠北那個. 哦. 要不要吃薯條? 殺毀. (6) [Subtitle]: 你沒有嚇到喔. 為啥嚇到. 啊就吃醋很正常啊. 熱戀期本來就會吃醋. (7) [Subtitle]: 我是說我跟學長在一起的事. 哦. 這又沒什麼. 有什麼好奇怪的啊. 你想太多了啦. (8) [Subtitle]: 而且提拉根本不可能喜歡學長好不好. 你與其在這邊苦惱. 不如直接去找學長談談. 談完後就知道他的想法啦. (9) [Subtitle]: 不愧是令人想出櫃的臉. 到底什麼意思. (10) [Subtitle]: 哦可是. 我這樣講他會不會覺得我莫名其妙啊. 你是很莫名其妙啊. 靠北喔. (11) [Subtitle]: 沒事啦, 這本來就會經過的過程. 等再久一點就會覺得. 這時候的自己像個白痴一樣. (12) [Subtitle]: 才不會咧. 沒有, 你真的超白痴. 不要時空對話. (13) [Subtitle]: 而且我覺得你也可以跟提拉他們說明. 他們根本就沒差好不好. 我不知道耶. (14) [Subtitle]: 因為我跟他們是室友. 然後又成天膩在一起. 我很怕如果我跟他們說. 之後會有疙瘩. 哦. (15) [Subtitle]: 那等等要不要吃麵疙瘩. 到底在講什麼意義不明.

visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: One male with black spiky hair and a blue shirt; one bald male in a black shirt.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: Primary setting is a fast-food restaurant with red walls and a McDonald's logo. Secondary setting is a room with blue shelves holding toys.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with a bouncy, comedic electronic synthesizer track playing at a moderate tempo. Two male voices are heard engaging in a fast-paced dialogue. One voice sounds anxious and high-pitched, while the other is more grounded and casual. (2) A 'pop' sound effect occurs as a character makes a sudden realization, followed by an increase in vocal intensity as the anxious character exclaims. The music remains consistent in the background. (3) A 'thud' or percussive impact SFX sounds when a character is frustrated. The voices maintain a high degree of expressive variability, often moving between exaggerated shock and calm explanation. (4) Toward the end, the music continues as the dialogue settles into a more rhythmic exchange, punctuated by occasional short cartoon-style 'whoosh' or 'ding' effects during transitions. The primary signal remains clean with high intelligibility.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Linear: Setup -> Confession -> Shock/Reaction -> Reassurance -> Pun/Joke.
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: A comedic animation depicting a conversation between two friends where one accidentally confesses a personal secret (relationship status) and receives a nonchalant and pun-filled reaction from his friend.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: McDonald's is used as a generic backdrop for setting realism in an animation.

high_inference.freeDescribe: High-quality 2D character animation with professional voice acting and comedic timing, typical of social media webtoon series.
